visual: From cross hands, palms turn down and arms press slowly to the sides as feet bring together, returning to a neutral standing posture.
motion_description: The sequence begins from a wide stance with forearms held near the mid-torso. The arms extend outward and upward towards shoulder height, then draw inward, positioning the palms face-down in front of the upper chest. The hands slowly and continuously press downwards to rest straight at the sides of the body. As the hands finish their descent, the torso remains squarely forward-facing while the weight shifts to the right leg, allowing the left foot to step inward and conclude in a neutral, feet-together posture.
